---
title: "Cutoff Tracker"
---

The Cutoff Tracker displays the number of records across categories with the status Ready. The entire bar indicates the total number of records in a specific category. The colored part of the bar indicates the number of records with a Ready status within this category.

Follow these steps to navigate and interact with the dashboard:

-  Filter the records by their cutoff readiness: Click the calendar icon on the upper-right corner of the dashboard and select a month and a year.   ![The calendar button displayed in the Cutoff Tracker Dashboard](data:image/png;base64,)  You can select past, current, or future dates.
-  Select action as needed. The following options are available:
| Action | Description |
| --- | --- |
| Hover over a grey part of the bar | Displays the total number of records for the category |
| Hover over the colored part of the bar | Displays the number and percentage of records with Ready status in this category. |
| Click a column in the chart | Displays results on the Records Management tab, filtered by the Ready status, the category associated with that column, and the month of the cutoff. |
